transcription.text: This is what it's like to go on a Mediterranean cruise with Celebrity Cruises. You can visit bucket list destinations such as Santorini and Capri, stay in a spacious infinite veranda stateroom with unbeatable sea views, enjoy fantastic stage productions and on-board activities. One of the highlights is of course the food, with unique dining experiences such as La Petite Chef and a wide range of international cuisine available every day. There are also plenty of places to recharge, including the multi-level Eden venue and the Sunset Bar. Plus swimming pools for sea days, all paired with exceptional service and attention to detail. We sailed on board Celebrity Ascent, a award-winning edge series ship featuring a rooftop garden, the magic carpet and a modern design with something for everyone.
